contentItem.data: {"title":"Software development proposal draft","brief":"Create a reviewed proposal draft and send it into the supervisor approval queue.","summary":"This proposal outlines the development of a software solution tailored for Lightheart Holding, aimed at producing a thoroughly reviewed draft ready for supervisory approval within a four-week timeframe and a budget of EUR 15,000 to 20,000.","proposalOutline":"1. Requirements Analysis: Detailed understanding of Lightheart Holding's needs and expectations. 2. Proposal Drafting: Develop the initial software proposal draft based on gathered requirements. 3. Review and Refinement: Conduct internal reviews, incorporate feedback, and refine the draft to meet quality standards. 4. Supervisor Review Preparation: Format and finalize the proposal draft for supervisory assessment. 5. Submission: Send the completed draft into the supervisor approval queue within the requested 4-week timeline.","company":"Lightheart Holding","requestedTimeline":"4 weeks"}
